name: epi
description: Search and rank academic papers for an EPI wiki.

interface.shortDescription: v0.2.0 | Find, vet, route sources, OA-acquire, hand off to PRW, wiki-ask, and record PRW requests.
interface.longDescription: EPI packages a Codex workflow for profile-driven academic paper discovery, MCP-backed multi-source source coverage, provider-readiness-aware source routing, OA-first PDF acquisition with manual download cards when no direct PDF is available, lightweight PDF identity verification before MinerU, non-authoritative retrieval preview, source-first bundle preservation, MinerU parsing, bounded lifecycle cleanup, optional reader/critic review, low-burden reading reports, Chinese-first approval reports, wiki handoff, read-only formal graph wiki-ask, final-source-review recording, and proposal-based quality evolution. It derives search terms, venue prior, ranking, and wiki/reader emphasis from the user's config plus the current request, blocks incomplete or mismatched source bundles before final deposition, and prepares handoffs for an agent to write into the target Obsidian/LLM Wiki according to that vault's contract.
defaultPrompt: Prepare ranked papers through MinerU parse, source bundle audit, Chinese approval report, wiki handoff, and paper gate.
Ask read-only questions against the formal paper wiki graph with wiki-ask.
